---
title: A few notes about GPUs
title-block-banner: true
---

:::{.topdef}

Before launching into courses involving GPUs, these short notes get you started on using GPUs on the Alliance clusters. They also briefly introduce [CUDA](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/CUDA) and how to access it in Python.

:::

<br>

:::{.card}

[**Please find these notes [in the Python section](/python/gpu_intro.qmd){.stretched-link}**.]{.btn-redirect}

:::
